name: Crunchy Hot Crab Bites
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Crab meat, drained, all bits
2 tablespoons Fresh lime or lemon juice
1 tablespoon Hot prepared mustard (or to taste)
Several dashes of Liquid-hot-pepper sauce (or to taste)
1/2 cup Grated Swiss or sharp cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crab meat with lime or lemon juice, lime peel, green onion, parsley, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, and hot-pepper sauce. Taste and adjust seasonings.
2. Brush melted butter on each Melba toast round.
3. Arrange the rounds in a single layer in a broiler pan.
4. Place a portion of the crab mixture onto each round, then add 1-1/2 teaspoons of cheese.
5. Broil until the cheese is melted and the crab mixture is hot.
Makes 16 appetizers. Optional substitutions include tuna, small cooked shrimp, or deviled ham for the crab.
